records.m_Talk_ENG: ERRAGHH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ERRAGHH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ERRAGHH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was the last one, Nicole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was the last one, Nicole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was the last one, Nicole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's a relief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's a relief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's a relief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did great.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did great.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did great.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honey... ginseng... tea?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honey... ginseng... tea?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honey... ginseng... tea?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want it, never mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want it, never mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want it, never mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'll take it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'll take it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'll take it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's water under the bridge now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's water under the bridge now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's water under the bridge now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's good to hear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's good to hear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's good to hear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... a relief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... a relief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... a relief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... was it that obvious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... was it that obvious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... was it that obvious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Extremely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Extremely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Extremely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So that's where it started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So that's where it started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So that's where it started.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something frightening?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something frightening?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something frightening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters attacked the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters attacked the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters attacked the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then a group of cats appeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then a group of cats appeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then a group of cats appeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there was a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there was a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there was a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you think that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you think that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you think that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd gone numb.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd gone numb.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd gone numb.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what was that devil like on the inside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what was that devil like on the inside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what was that devil like on the inside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I failed. This time as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I failed. This time as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I failed. This time as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's just lying to yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's just lying to yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's just lying to yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... That hit the spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... That hit the spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... That hit the spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an emergency broadcast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an emergency broadcast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an emergency broadcast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be all right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be all right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be all right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ERRAGHH!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ERRAGHH!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ERRAGHH!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was the last one, Nicole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was the last one, Nicole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was the last one, Nicole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no point unloading on a pumpkin that's not even moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The real one probably slipped away while we were fighting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should we ask the City Management's monitoring team to track it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. Even if they're not devils, they must already be busy enough with other problems.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get the civilians to a safe place first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who was being held has been sent back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly the same number as the missing persons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's a relief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's a relief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's a relief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did great.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did great.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did great.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Want some honey ginseng tea? I picked it up at a convenience store.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honey... ginseng... tea?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honey... ginseng... tea?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honey... ginseng... tea?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want it, never mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want it, never mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want it, never mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'll take it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'll take it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'll take it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for thinking of me. I'll enjoy it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not even a Counter, yet I went around acting on my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's water under the bridge now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's water under the bridge now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's water under the bridge now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've already seen enough to know you're strong enough that I don't need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think I could defeat a Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I know is that even the strongest person I knew couldn't stand up to a Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I can't do it on my own after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's the Administration... they can protect people from a Demon Lord, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever heard of the Qliphoth Game?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Oh... I learned about it from a broadcast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The incident where many TASKFORCEs went to the Counterside and stopped C.O.s that threatened reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know what really happened in the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the battle where the Demon Lord and humanity staked their continued existence, humanity ultimately prevailed under the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humanity... defeated a Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this time too, we should be able to protect everyone. ...It won't be easy, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's good to hear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's good to hear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's good to hear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... a relief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... a relief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... a relief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, This isn't an interrogation but just a personal question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You got especially rough when you ran into that pumpkin head. Are you good now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... was it that obvious?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... was it that obvious?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... was it that obvious?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Extremely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Extremely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Extremely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before you came to our bar, how much did you look into me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That you grew up at the Charade orphanage, worked for Holy Curia, then got a job at a bar in Ground One... more or less.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the exorcist ordination records on paper, but I didn't pay much attention. I was more surprised by how strong you were.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So that's where it started.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So that's where it started.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So that's where it started.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until I was five, I lived with my parents.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before coming to the city orphanage, I lived on a small farm in a country called Nordnavik, not Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have many happy memories from that time I want to cherish...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the more I try to remember them, the more something frightening follows, so at some point I stopped thinking about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something frightening?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something frightening?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something frightening?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters attacked the village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters attacked the village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters attacked the village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not just the village. Even the capital we tried to flee to...

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, not just the capital, but the entire country was swarming with monsters called C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Purification War... or maybe even earlier than that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A time when humanity couldn't mount any real resistance and was slaughtered outright.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That day, I was playing alone by a stream, hiding nearby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't bring myself to cross the screams and howls to go back home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then a group of cats appeared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then a group of cats appeared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then a group of cats appeared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it was because I saw smoke rising from home, or because I was afraid of being alone... I followed the cats back to the village without thinking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when I reached the place where the cats had gathered, my parents were already gone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there was a devil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there was a devil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there was a devil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment our eyes met, I knew. It was the one that killed my parents.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That unforgettable sight was the last thing I remember before losing consciousness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After that, what I remember is a priest of the Holy Curia telling me I was the village's sole survivor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So the Holy Curia people came to that village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I came to understand my situation and slowly sort out my feelings... I made a decision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To destroy the being that took everything from me, even if it meant offering everything I had.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was that when you decided to become an exorcist?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I'd been a little more composed, maybe I wouldn't have let that devil get away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you think that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you think that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you think that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd gone numb.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd gone numb.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd gone numb.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I swore never to show any emotion to devils...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for a while now, I started thinking that maybe not all devils are purely evil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like you'd met one like that before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it was so different from the image of devils I'd learned about... she looked like a child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I knew I should not judge by appearances, I couldn't bring myself to strike that devil down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what was that devil like on the inside?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what was that devil like on the inside?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what was that devil like on the inside?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A walking disaster that carried misfortune with her. But also a child so kind and lovable I couldn't abandon her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I knew I shouldn't, I treated that devil far too emotionally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I failed. This time as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I failed. This time as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I failed. This time as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think you can't take revenge if you show your emotions?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Evil always tries to exploit human emotions as a weakness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why an exorcist's reason for slaying devils... must be a calling, not revenge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's just lying to yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's just lying to yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's just lying to yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it were me, instead of trying to erase my emotions, I'd face what's right in front of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the evil I face peers into my feelings and tries to use them, I'd still choose what my heart tells me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's just my standard. If you don't like it, just let it go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... That hit the spot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... That hit the spot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... That hit the spot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At first, the strong aroma caught me off guard, but it's actually quite drinkable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right? I thought it was no longer sold anywhere, but somehow they still have it here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should I get one for Momo too? It's sweet, so she'd definitely like it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... I wonder if she would.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an emergency broadcast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an emergency broadcast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an emergency broadcast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So far, acute Counterside Effects have been detected in a total of fifteen districts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Recon units have been dispatched for confirmation. Personnel near the transmission coordinates are to verify the situation on site and respond accordingly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* What are those stragglers up to now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They aren't stupid enough to use the same trick twice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be all right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be all right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be all right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have been doing pretty well so far, haven't we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go.
